title: delphinium pictum subsp. requienii
intro: Delphinium pictum subsp. requienii, commonly known as the Corsican delphinium, is a subspecies of the delphinium pictum plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, with its roots and leaves possessing medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Delphinium pictum subsp. requienii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviation of spasms and pain associated with menstrual cramps and other conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
